user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
**Ticket:** [Customer Name] - Urgent Complaint/Threat of Negative Review
**Priority:** HIGH
**Category:** Technical/General Support

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I can hear how frustrated you are, and I am truly sorry for the experience you’ve had. I understand that this situation is incredibly stressful, and I want to make sure we get this resolved for you as quickly as possible.

I am prioritizing your case right now to understand exactly what went wrong. To help me get this fixed immediately, could you please provide a few more details?

1. [Specific question related to the issue, e.g., "What error message are you seeing?"]
2. [Specific question, e.g., "When did this issue first start occurring?"]

Once I have this information, I will personally oversee the fix or escalate this to our senior technical team if needed. My goal is to turn this around for you.

Thank you for your patience while I look into this. I’ll be waiting for your reply.

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a response drafting request within its support agent role and provided a high-quality, empathetic draft as requested.
